headline: Vicki Hollub’s decade at Oxy: From brash merger to June farewell
summary: When Vicki Hollub took over as Occidental Petroleum's CEO on April 29, 2016, the shares were at $60.76. Ten years later, with Hollub preparing to step aside from the job, the shares are just above $60, which gives you an idea of the struggles the big exploration and production company has ...

headline: Exxon using AI for faster analysis of Guyana's oil fields, VP of exploration says
summary: New ‌developments in ‌AI and technology are helping ​Exxon Mobil interpret seismic data from Guyana in days, ‌rather than ⁠months, John Ardill, the company's ⁠vice president of exploration, said on ​Tuesday. The ​company, ​which leads an ‌oil-producing consortium in Guyana, is also using new technology to go after ‌oil assets it ​previously ​ignored, ​he said while ‌speaking at the ​Offshore ​Technology Conference in Houston.

headline: Chevron expands Mediterranean footprint with Malta oil and gas exploration
summary: Chevron (NYSE:CVX) said Tuesday it will begin exploring for oil and gas south of Malta, extending its presence in the Mediterranean region and positioning itself near established producers such as Libya, Italy, and Tunisia. Malta itself currently has no active oil or gas production.
